import React from "react"; const About = () => { return (
{/* Headline + Mission */}

Reliable. Skilled. Local.

At James Salls Roofing & Remodeling, we’ve built a reputation for quality craftsmanship, honest pricing, and personalized service throughout Connecticut.

{/* Background Story */}

Our Story

With over 10 years of hands-on experience, James and his team have helped homeowners with everything from full roof replacements to complete home remodels. What began as a small word-of-mouth business has grown into a trusted local name known for hard work, clear communication, and lasting results.

{/* What Sets Us Apart */}

Why Homeowners Choose Us

  • Family-owned and operated
  • Fully licensed and insured
  • Specializing in both roofing and remodeling
  • Customer-first approach with honest quotes
{/* Optional Team Photo or Message */}

“Hi, I’m James – I started this company to bring integrity and transparency back to home improvement.”

— James Salls, Owner

{/* Call to Action */}
Get a Free Quote
); }; export default About;
